TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILMORE, SHARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 9TH ST, RM.#115, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-22-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. VACATES PREMISES 2-22-94, 5PM, PL. WILL VACATE JUDGMENT & DISM ACTION. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/JACQUELINE WOODS AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 150 9TH ST, RM.#115, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 2-22-94 - SHERIFF MAY POST PRIOR TO EVICTION - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - NO FURTHER STAYS OF EVICTION - IF DEF. VACATES BY 2-22-94, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISMISS - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. IN CONSIDERA- TION OF DEF. WAIVING ALL CLAIMS KNOWN & UN KNOWN AGAINST THE PL. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
